settings.title: Sunrise Yoga Studio
settings.tagline: Find your flow at Sunrise Yoga Studio
settings.description: Sunrise Yoga Studio in Portland, OR. Classes for all levels: vinyasa flow, yin & restorative, hot yoga, and more. Join our welcoming community.

content.headline: Your practice starts here
content.subheadline: Sunrise Yoga Studio in Portland, OR offers yoga for every body. Whether you're a first-timer or an advanced practitioner, our classes meet you where you are. Come breathe, move, and grow with us.

content.headline: Why choose Sunrise Yoga Studio
content.subheadline: Expert instruction, inclusive community, and a practice tailored to your body and goals.

features.title: Vinyasa Flow
features.description: Dynamic, breath-linked movement that builds strength and flexibility. All levels welcome.

features.title: Yin & Restorative
features.description: Slow, deep stretches held for minutes. Perfect for recovery, stress relief, and finding stillness.

features.title: Hot Yoga
features.description: Practice in a heated room to deepen stretches, detoxify, and build endurance. Bring water and a towel.

features.title: Community Classes
features.description: Weekly donation-based classes open to everyone. Yoga is for every body, every budget.

features.title: Private Sessions
features.description: One-on-one instruction tailored to your goals. Injury recovery, prenatal, or personal development.

features.title: Workshops & Retreats
features.description: Weekend workshops and seasonal retreats to deepen your practice and connect with community.

testimonials.quote: Sunrise Yoga Studio changed my relationship with my body. The instructors are warm, knowledgeable, and never make you feel like you're not enough.
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: I came for the hot yoga and stayed for the community. This studio feels like home.
testimonials.author: David L.

testimonials.quote: As a complete beginner, I was nervous. By the end of my first class, I was hooked. The vibe here is everything.
testimonials.author: Priya K.

items.question: Do I need experience?
items.answer: Not at all. Every class offers modifications for all levels. Our instructors will help you find your edge without pushing past it.

items.question: What should I bring?
items.answer: Just yourself and a water bottle. We provide mats, blocks, straps, and blankets. For hot yoga, bring a towel.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: Drop-in classes are $20. Monthly unlimited is $99. We also offer a 10-class pack for $150. First class is always free.

items.question: Do you offer teacher training?
items.answer: Yes! We run 200-hour and 500-hour teacher training programs. Check our workshops page for upcoming dates.

content.headline: Pricing & Class Options
content.subheadline: We believe yoga should be accessible to everyone. Choose the option that works best for your practice and your budget.

plans.name: Drop-In
plans.description: Pay as you go. Try a class anytime.

plans.name: 10-Class Pack
features: 10 classes to use at your pace

items.question: Is there a first class free offer?
items.answer: Yes! Your first class is always free. Try us out, meet the instructors, and see if we're the right fit for you.

items.question: Can I pause or cancel my membership?
items.answer: Absolutely. Monthly memberships can be paused or cancelled anytime with no penalties. We want you to practice because you love it, not because you're stuck.

items.question: Do you offer student or senior discounts?
items.answer: Yes. Students and seniors get 15% off all packages. Just show your student ID or let us know during sign-up.

items.question: What about private sessions?
items.answer: Private sessions are $75/hour and can be customized to your goals — injury recovery, prenatal prep, or deepening your practice. Book via our contact form.

content.headline: Get in Touch
content.subheadline: Questions about classes, scheduling, or our studio? We'd love to hear from you. Reach out anytime — we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
